description: Sector overlay for accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/provincial/territorial legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: CPAB registration and audit oversight requirements
National Instrument 52-109 Certification of Disclosure in Issuers' Annual and Interim Filings
primary_sources.issuer: Canadian Securities Administrators / Ontario Securities Commission

primary_sources.name: Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act and FINTRAC guidance

rules.title: CPAB registration or audit oversight evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CPAB participation, reporting issuer audit oversight, or registration evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audit quality management system evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for quality management, CSQM/ISQM, file inspection, remediation, or audit quality controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial reporting controls or certification evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ICFR, disclosure controls, financial statement certification, or GAAP/IFRS reporting controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Client due diligence evidence is present for applicable professional services
rules.summary: Checks for client identification, beneficial ownership, risk assessment, or suspicious-transaction escalation evidence in accounting/professional-services documents.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
